TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_item TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_item.
TYPES : TT_RATE TYPE REF TO TY_RATE.
Types : tt_J_1IG_INVREFNUM type STANDARD TABLE OF J_1IG_INVREFNUM.
types : tt_konv type STANDARD TABLE OF prcd_elements.
types : tt_EKKO type standard table of EKKO.
tt_mkpf TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mkpf.
tt_mseg TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mseg.
tt_conditions TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_conditions.
tt_mat_desc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mat_desc.
tt_t157e TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_t157e.
tt_bset TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_bset.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: Read table gt_material_doc_hdr into gs_material_doc_hdr index 1.
READ TABLE GT_MATERIAL_DOC[] INTO ls_item INDEX 1.
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE LT_MSEG01
WHERE mblnr = WA_MSEG01-mblnr and mjahr = WA_MSEG01-mjahr
* and ebeln = ls_item-ebeln AND ebelp = ls_item-ebelp
lt_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
* REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<&>' IN ls_lines-tdline WITH '&'.
* CONCATENATE lv_longtxt ls_lines-tdline INTO lv_longtxt SEPARATED BY space.
lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'GRUN' name = lv_id object = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING lv_lines = DATA(lv_lines1) ).
SELECT SINGLE STEUC FROM MARC INTO LV_STEUC
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_EKKO
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_KONV
WHEN 'ZST1' OR 'ZSCQ' OR 'ZSCV' OR 'ZST%' OR 'ZSTQ' OR 'ZSTV'.
READ TABLE gt_material_doc_hdr INTO ls_material_doc_hdr INDEX 1.
lv_tot1 = ins_val + gv_tot_amt + gv_del_tax + gv_scq + fri_val + pfl_val.
grand_tot = tot_tax + ins_val + gv_tot_amt + gv_del_tax + gv_scq + fri_val + pfl_val." +
*grand_tot = tot_tax + ins_val + gv_tot_amt + gv_del_ta + gv_scq + fri_val + pfl_val." +
GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD'CENTS ' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE 'SAUDI RIYAL' GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'ONLY' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'HALALAS ONLY' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'RUPEES ONLY' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'PAISE' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'EURO' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'CENTS' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'YUANS' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'JIAOS' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'POUNDS' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'PENNYS' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SPLIT gv_gst_wrd AT '' INTO TABLE ITAB.
CONCATENATE gv_gst_wrd ITAB-TEXT INTO gv_gst_wrd SEPARATED BY ''.
GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD'CENTS ' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE 'SAUDI RIYAL' GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'ONLY' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE 'SAUDI RIYAL' GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'AND' GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'HALALAS ONLY' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'RUPEES ONLY' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'RUPEES AND' GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'PAISE' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'EURO' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'EURO AND' GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'CENTS' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'YUANS' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'YUANS AND' GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'JIAOS' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'POUNDS' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT2-WORD 'POUNDS AND' GV_AMOUNT2-DECWORD 'PENNYS' INTO net_amount SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SPLIT gv_tot_wrd AT '' INTO TABLE ITAB.
CONCATENATE gv_tot_wrd ITAB-TEXT INTO gv_tot_wrd SEPARATED BY ''.
READ TABLE GT_MATERIAL_DOC_HDR INTO ls_MATERIAL_DOC_HDR INDEX 1.

FORMS.FPCLINE: DATA : TEXT_LINES TYPE TABLE OF TLINE,
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
